name: Calix, Inc.
description: Calix, Inc. provides cloud and software platforms, systems, and services in the United States, the United Kingdom, and internationally. The company's cloud and software platforms, and systems enable service providers of all sizes to simplify their business, excite their subscribers, and grow their value. Its platform and services portfolio includes Calix Cloud, Calix Revenue EDGE, and Calix Intelligent Access EDGE, which allow broadband service providers to design, build, and deliver a wide range of services.
